campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review a transportation authority investment report for March 2026, approve a new policy about how city property can be used, and discuss current job openings and hiring efforts at the city.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's March 2026 investment report
New city policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and recruitment/retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a hearing on plans to clean up hazardous conditions on certain properties that the county identified. The council also adopted new policies on technology disruption and approved a process for residents to request reasonable accommodations from the city.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by the county
New Technology Disruption Policy replacing the old city policy
Process for submitting and resolving reasonable accommodation requests

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve routine meeting minutes and financial reports, accept a donation of emergency medical equipment, and authorize several contracts and grant applications. Key items included approving a paving construction contract and setting up projects for the next fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved March 2026 financial and investment report
Accepted donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Authorized construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Submitted grant applications for statewide funding
Adopted list of projects for Fiscal Year 2026-27

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and update work plans for city committees. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so the council reviewed plans for the June 2 meeting, including which items to add and whether any need special time slots.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26 City Council meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda planning and item additions
Updates to Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan
Updates to Rules and Open Government Committee work plan

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: Mountain View's City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select new members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for 2026-27
Public comment period
Meeting minutes approval
Upcoming board and commission agendas

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council met on May 19, 2026, to conduct regular business and recognize two important observances: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting included approval of April meeting minutes and standard council procedures.
keyTopics: Recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month
Affordable Housing Month observance
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's long-term health and safety plan (covering 2015-2040), recognized the Public Works Department for their work on roads, trees, and city maintenance during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Updates to the Health and Safety Element of the General Plan
Public Works Department recognition for roads, sidewalks, trees, and facilities maintenance
Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month celebration
Some agenda items were postponed

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara's Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, to discuss topics related to station area development and planning. The meeting was held in person at City Hall and also available online via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall Council Chambers (1500 Warburton Avenue)
Virtual attendance available via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held several public hearings and voted on new city rules and permits. Key actions included approving a new city manager, amending zoning rules with urgent new ordinances, and approving a development project with a site permit and tentative map.
keyTopics: Permanent City Manager appointment
New urgency ordinance
Site development permit amendment and tentative map approval
Assessment confirmation and ordering

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs that would help the city comply with air quality regulations.
keyTopics: Residential electrification programs to reduce gas appliance use
Proposed principles to guide how electrification assistance will work
Compliance with air district regulations
Staff presentation on electrification status and next steps
